- [ ] `pnpm test`

- [ ] `composer analyze`

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Main failure mode:
- Mitigation:

## Migration notes

Describe required migration steps for consuming repositories, if any.

## Rollback notes

Describe how to revert safely if this change causes downstream breakage.

## Checklist

- [ ] No product names, product-specific examples, or trademarked concepts were added.
- [ ] Enforcement matrix entries were updated where applicable.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes were reviewed.
- [ ] Documentation remains consistent with implementation.
